aside.t2: Front-End Developer with Back-End Skills | React.js, Next.js & AI Specialist

aboutMe.t2: Front-End Developer with over 6 years of experience in software development, data analysis, and systems support. Specialized in modern web technologies such as React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, .NET, and PostgreSQL. Proven experience building scalable full-stack applications, integrating AI-driven solutions, and managing projects from concept to deployment. Strong problem-solving skills and effective collaboration in multidisciplinary teams.

experience.c1t1: Led the development of a social network that uses AI to analyze posts and generate profiles of electoral candidates.
experience.c1t2: Implemented the platform with Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL (Google Cloud SQL), and Vercel, ensuring high scalability and performance.
experience.c2t1: Developed a responsive full-stack website using Next.js and TypeScript.
experience.c2t2: Integrated and customized the Strapi CMS for content management.
experience.c3t1: Developed automated reports using SQL Server Reporting Services (SSRS).
experience.c3t2: Created query pages with parameterized reports to optimize data access.
experience.c3t3: Collaborated on modernizing the Patrimonial Registration System (SIRPA), improving efficiency and usability.
experience.c4t1: Developed responsive websites using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, enhancing user experience on educational platforms.
experience.c4t2: Provided technical support and customer service for Moodle environments, resolving issues and optimizing processes.
experience.c4t3: Managed SQL databases and contributed to eLearning content development with Storyline 360 and Adapt Learning / Adapt Framework.
experience.c4t4: Participated in developing a customer service simulator using GameMaker for internal training.
experience.c4t5: Contributed to the development and maintenance of corporate websites.
